creator: trialero@gmx.com
text:
The installation of sysutils/upower somehow lacks installation to 'upowerd', which is also not on the system after installation

Using a script that triggers upower, the output is

(upower:8320): UPower-WARNING **: 19:46:24:256: Cannot connect to upowerd: Cannot connect: No such file or directory

FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p8 GENERIC i386

Before upgrading from p7 to p8 all worked well.

TIA,

//meine
